1651.reason: [Error: Single '|' should not yield Type.OR (which is for "||"); this causes incorrect tokenization instead of treating it as an error]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Single '|' should not yield Type.OR (which is for "||"); this causes incorrect tokenization instead of treating it as an error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Single '|' should not be categorized as OR token type (which is for "||"); it should be UNKNOWN to prevent further parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '|', it should not be treated as OR (which represents '||'); yielding Type.OR is incorrect and will cause the parser to accept invalid syntax. It should yield Type.UNKNOWN instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '|', it should not be treated as OR token (which represents "||"); doing so masks the lexical error and causes incorrect parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Single '|' should not be treated as OR token type (which represents '||'); it should be treated as an error and yield UNKNOWN instead]

1654.reason: [Error: Single '&' should not yield Type.AND (which is for "&&"); this causes incorrect tokenization instead of treating it as an error]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Single '&' should not yield Type.AND (which is for "&&"); this causes incorrect tokenization instead of treating it as an error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Single '&' should not be categorized as AND token type (which is for "&&"); it should be UNKNOWN to prevent further parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it should not be treated as AND (which represents '&&'); yielding Type.AND is incorrect and will cause the parser to accept invalid syntax. It should yield Type.UNKNOWN instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it should not be treated as AND token (which represents "&&"); doing so masks the lexical error and causes incorrect parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Single '&' should not be treated as AND token type (which represents '&&'); it should be treated as an error and yield UNKNOWN instead]
